description:
# Calendar and Todo Sync

Add Calendar (events) and Todo (lists) as shared CRDT domains. Todos have a three-tier permission model: user lists (agent-readable), per-instance Ava lists (writable only by owning Ava + user, readable by all Avas), and shared lists. Calendar events sync across all instances.

## Phases
1. Calendar CRDT Sync
2. Todo CRDT Sync and Permissions
title: [Epic] Calendar and Todo Sync

descriptionHistory.description:
# Calendar and Todo Sync

Add Calendar (events) and Todo (lists) as shared CRDT domains. Todos have a three-tier permission model: user lists (agent-readable), per-instance Ava lists (writable only by owning Ava + user, readable by all Avas), and shared lists. Calendar events sync across all instances.

## Phases
1. Calendar CRDT Sync
2. Todo CRDT Sync and Permissions
